decoder_heading: Privacy policy
ident_heading: privacy policy
heading_content_part: privacy policyPrivacy policyWe care about the security of your personal data. This Privacy Policy is designed to ensure that you are confident that your data is protected when you use or access any game, application, or other digital content, "Kitoved."By using our Services, you consent to the collection and processing of your personal data in accordance with this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree to the terms of this Privacy Policy, please do not provide us any information or use the Services.

decoder_heading: Privacy policy
ident_heading: privacy policy
heading_content_part: This Privacy Policy (in conjunction with the Terms of Use) establishes the rules on the basis of which we process the personal data we receive from you or that you provide to us through the Services.If you have questions or suggestions regarding our Privacy Policy, please contact us at: cosmoved0o@gmail.comIn this Privacy Policy, the terms "Kitoved" / "we" / "our" / "us" mean Team Kitoved Developers, and "you" / "your" mean you as a user of our Services.

decoder_heading: 1. AGE RESTRICTIONS
ident_heading: 1. AGE RESTRICTIONS
heading_content_part: 1. AGE RESTRICTIONSWe do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13 years of age in accordance with COPPA rules. If you are under 13 years old, please do not provide us with any personal data.

decoder_heading: 2. PERSONAL DATA WHICH WE CAN GATHER
ident_heading: 2. PERSONAL DATA WHICH WE CAN GATHER
heading_content_part: 2. PERSONAL DATA WHICH WE CAN GATHERStatistical data on activities and trends that do not personally identify you. Such data includes data about your mobile device and the use of our Services, including the unique device identifier (UDID), the international mobile device identifier (IMEI), Android ID, the device's MAC address, social network ID, advertising ID for the platform Android, IDFA advertising ID, operating system type, timestamps, data about downloaded applications, traffic, location.

decoder_heading: 5.1 We take appropriate organizational and technical measures to protect the personal data that we have.
ident_heading: 5.1 We take appropriate organizational and technical measures to protect the personal data that we have.
heading_content_part: 5.1 We take appropriate organizational and technical measures to protect the personal data that we have. Access to your personal data is obtained only by those persons who, in our opinion, really need to become familiar with them in the framework of their work.

decoder_heading: 5.2 The information we receive from you can be transferred and stored at a location outside the European Economic Area (EEA).
ident_heading: 5.2 The information we receive from you can be transferred and stored at a location outside the European Economic Area (EEA).
heading_content_part: 5.2 The information we receive from you can be transferred and stored at a location outside the European Economic Area (EEA). It can also be processed by our employees, as well as employees of one of our subsidiaries or a third party engaged by us outside of the EEA. By giving us your personal data, you consent to such transfer, storage or processing. We will take all reasonable steps necessary to ensure the security of your personal data in all listed cases in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

decoder_heading: 5.3 Unfortunately, the transfer of information through the Internet can not be absolutely safe.

heading_content_part: 5.3 Unfortunately, the transfer of information through the Internet can not be absolutely safe. Despite the fact that we take all measures to protect your personal data, we can not guarantee the protection of your information transmitted to us inside our Services, and you assume the risks of such transfer.

decoder_heading: 5.4 By transferring your personal data to us, you agree that we will store your data for as long as necessary (up to 5 years) in order to ensure the operation of any of the services we provide or to comply with applicable laws, requests and relevant orders of the courts of competent jurisdiction.

heading_content_part: 7. REFERENCESOur Services can contain links from other sites and services, as well as leading to other sites and services. We are not responsible for the use of personal data or the content of third-party sites. Please check the policy of using personal data of such websites and services before sending them any personal data.

decoder_heading: 8. ADVERTISERS
ident_heading: 8. ADVERTISERS
heading_content_part: 8.1 From time to time, we may engage third-party advertisers or sponsors in our Services. In this case, we do not disclose any information that allows us to identify specific users, but we can provide them with generalized information about our users. We can also use this generalized information to help advertisers connect with the audience they are targeting (for example, men from London). We can use personal data received from you to satisfy the request of our advertisers or sponsors to display their advertising to such a target audience.
